seoTitle: Chapman vs Chifley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Chapman and Chifley. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Chapman and Chifley.
heading: Chapman vs Chifley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Chapman, Australian Capital Territory and Chifley, Australian Capital Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Chapman and Chifley have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Chapman or Chifley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Chapman has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Chifley scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Chapman scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Chifley scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Chapman or Chifley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Chapman has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
